# AlignVerticalDistributeCenter

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::AlignVerticalDistributeCenter;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        AlignVerticalDistributeCenter { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
items, flex, justify, space, evenly, around

layout
